headline: Cisco Systems Reported Lower FCF and Margins - Has CSCO Stock Peaked?
summary: Cisco Systems' free cash flow fell vs last year, as did its FCF margins. However, its fair value could be 16% higher based on higher revenue forecasts. One play is to sell short out-of-the-money puts and calls.
